standard.purpose: Complete four-option learner feedback for the previously incomplete EPPP items without changing their prompts, choices, keys, rationales, or sources.
standard.reuseRule: A prior reviewed distractor explanation is reused only after semantic option matching meets the declared threshold; all other feedback is a conservative contrast derived from the current source-reviewed rationale.
standard.limitation: This editorial pass is not psychometric calibration, official exam approval, or independent licensed-psychologist validation.
